contractFields.outboundRequests: Data sent to a named third party after a user action; an empty list means no tool lookup request.
contractFields.notChecked: Material facts the tool cannot establish.
contractFields.decisionBoundary: The decision the output must not make on the user's behalf.

tools.name: PhD Timeline Planner
tools.purpose: Turn a registration date and pace choice into a printable milestone sequence.

sources.name: UGC (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2022
sources.access: official source; users must locate and confirm the current regulation and institutional ordinance

tools.limitations: Milestone timing beyond the national minimum and maximum is a planning sequence, not a regulatory deadline schedule.
tools.decisionBoundary: The plan does not determine eligibility to submit or override a university ordinance.
tools.userDataStorage: No registration date or pace choice is sent to Gurjas.

tools.name: SEM Planning Bounds Explorer
tools.purpose: Compare three disclosed SEM sample-planning approximations.

sources.name: Method references listed on the tool page

tools.limitations: The approximations are educational planning bounds and are not a model-specific analytic or Monte Carlo power analysis.
tools.decisionBoundary: The largest displayed value is not a universally sufficient sample size.
tools.userDataStorage: No entered parameters are sent to Gurjas.

tools.name: Reliability and Convergent Validity Calculator
tools.purpose: Calculate composite reliability, average variance extracted and Cronbach's alpha with explicit data checks.

sources.name: McNeish (2018), Thanks Coefficient Alpha, We'll Take It From Here

tools.limitations: Displayed thresholds are common reference markers, not universal pass/fail rules; alpha alone does not establish unidimensionality or reliability.
tools.decisionBoundary: The output does not establish that an instrument is valid or suitable for a particular study.
tools.userDataStorage: Raw responses and loadings remain in the user's browser.

tools.name: Journal Evidence Checker
tools.purpose: Assemble source-labelled journal identity, registration, indexing-snapshot and clone-alert evidence.
tools.limitations: Database absence can reflect coverage or naming differences. Local indexes can lag official sources. No weighted legitimacy score or automatic verdict is calculated.
tools.decisionBoundary: The dossier does not decide whether a journal is legitimate or safe to submit to.
tools.userDataStorage: The query goes directly from the browser to named databases; Gurjas does not receive it. Checklist answers remain in the browser.

tools.name: Literature-neighbour Journal Shortlist
tools.purpose: Find journal-type, ISSN-bearing OpenAlex sources connected to matching literature.

outboundRequests.data: title, keywords or acknowledged abstract up to 1,200 characters
the same query plus the selected journal's OpenAlex source ID

outputs: up to three sample matching papers per journal, on request
tools.limitations: OpenAlex coverage and source classification can be incomplete; matching-work count can favour large journals and is not a quality score.
tools.decisionBoundary: A displayed source is a literature neighbour to investigate, not an endorsement or submission recommendation.
tools.userDataStorage: The query goes directly from the browser to OpenAlex; Gurjas does not receive it.

tools.name: Recorded APC Lookup
tools.purpose: Report article-processing-charge and open-access fields recorded in OpenAlex.
tools.limitations: OpenAlex fields can be incomplete, converted or out of date. A fee record is neither an endorsement nor a warning.
tools.decisionBoundary: The lookup cannot validate an invoice, establish legitimacy or determine whether to pay.
tools.userDataStorage: The query goes directly from the browser to OpenAlex; Gurjas does not receive it.

tools.name: Reference and DOI Integrity Checker
tools.purpose: Check each pasted reference's DOI against the Crossref registry and surface recorded post-publication updates.

outboundRequests.data: an extracted DOI, one per recognised reference
the first 300 characters of a reference with no recognisable DOI

outputs: downloadable hash-stamped Markdown and JSON audit record
tools.limitations: Comparisons are text-overlap heuristics, not authoritative bibliographic verification. A DOI absent from Crossref is not evidence a work is illegitimate; it may be registered with a different agency.
tools.decisionBoundary: Does not certify a reference list as correct or complete; it reports registry evidence for manual verification.
tools.userDataStorage: Each reference's DOI or text goes directly from the browser to Crossref; Gurjas does not receive it.

tools.name: APC Invoice Triage
tools.purpose: Turn questionnaire answers about a received APC invoice into a discrepancy register of documented fraud patterns and factual comparisons.
tools.processing: local-browser, with one optional direct-third-party request

sources.name: OpenAlex
sources.access: live public API, used only for the optional amount comparison

outputs: five-item discrepancy register (payment method, invoice timing, payee match, domain match, quoted-vs-recorded amount)
downloadable hash-stamped Markdown and JSON audit record
notChecked: whether the journal itself is legitimate
tools.limitations: Each register row is Consistent, Discrepancy, Common fraud pattern or Not answered; no combined score or overall verdict is calculated. An invoice preceding acceptance is a documented fraud-pattern signal but is not decisive for publishers with a disclosed upfront-fee model.
tools.decisionBoundary: Does not determine whether the invoice is genuine or whether to pay it.
tools.userDataStorage: Questionnaire answers remain in the browser. Only an optional journal name or ISSN is ever sent anywhere, and only to OpenAlex.

tools.name: Institutional Evidence Readiness
tools.purpose: Inventory present, partial and missing institutional records across the legacy RAF seven-criteria structure.

sources.name: NAAC manuals
sources.access: official source; current framework must be confirmed

tools.limitations: The questions use a legacy RAF evidence structure and do not reproduce BAF/MBGL scoring. Answers are self-reported, not verified evidence.
tools.decisionBoundary: No accreditation percentage, grade prediction or official readiness score is calculated.
tools.userDataStorage: Answers remain in the user's browser.

tools.name: Research Readiness Triage
tools.purpose: Turn eight self-reported evidence-control states into a gap register and next-control plan.
outputs: downloadable hash-stamped Markdown and JSON audit record
tools.limitations: The inventory is unweighted and self-reported. A not-applicable selection can hide an essential control and must be justified outside the tool.
tools.decisionBoundary: The output is not a readiness score, verification, ethics decision, risk probability or success prediction.
tools.userDataStorage: All selections remain in the user's browser and are cleared when the page is closed or refreshed.

tools.name: Grant Deadline Tracker
tools.purpose: Keep selected Indian social-science and interdisciplinary funding calls visible with official links.
tools.limitations: Deadlines and statuses are dated pointers from selected official announcements and can change without notice.
tools.decisionBoundary: The tracker does not promise availability or replace the official call and portal.
tools.userDataStorage: No application or personal data is collected. Following an official link leaves gurjas.org.
